description_long: This object is a modern flat-panel computer monitor with a slim, rectangular display and a minimalist design. The screen is framed by a thin, matte black bezel, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The rear of the monitor is smooth and unadorned, with a central support column connecting to a wide, flat rectangular base for stability. The stand appears to be made of sturdy plastic or metal, and there are no visible buttons, ports, or branding on any side. The overall construction suggests a lightweight yet robust build, suitable for office or home environments. The monitor's proportions and clean lines make it visually unobtrusive and versatile for various urban settings.
description: A slim, modern flat-panel computer monitor with a thin black bezel and a wide, flat base. The design is minimalist, with no visible buttons, ports, or logos.
description_view_0: Side view showing the monitor's ultra-thin profile and the central support column attached to a flat base.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the smooth, unmarked back panel and the full width of the rectangular base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slimness of the screen and the central support structure.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back panel, support column, and the base's depth.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, matte black, and has a flat, minimalist appearance with no visible texture or decorative elements. Corners are slightly squared, and there is no color contrast or ornamentation.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a central, rectangular column attached to a wide, flat rectangular base, likely made of plastic or metal, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
